'''Teluron Thacker''' was a member of a [[Unidentified Eeyyon species|species]] that hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Eeyyon]]. He was the contact for the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], who was to give them information on the whereabouts of [[Granta Omega]]. Teluron and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] chatted in a diner, where they got all they needed to know about where Omega and [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] had gone to.

Later, when the Jedi needed a starship, Teluron gave them one, while he was all frightened and jittery. The Jedi knew that he'd betrayed them when the Security Forces tried to blow them out of the sky.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]'' {{1st}}
